falsification_rule_text: PRIMARY (dispositive): SUPPORTED if real GDP growth in fiscal year 2016-17 (which contains the demonetisation shock) is at least 0.5pp below the 2014-15 / 2015-16 mean AND fiscal year 2017-18 growth is at least 0.3pp below that same mean. REFUTED if either fiscal year's growth EXCEEDS the pre-period mean. INFORMATIVE (not gating): tax-revenue / GDP for IND should NOT rise by more than 1pp from 2015 to 2019 (no fiscal payoff).

variables_missing.name: post_demonetisation_indicator
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for IND, year >= 2016 (Nov 2016 shock)
